title: EternaYumeMon
description: Unique Cobblemon Experience for Multiplayer Servers
body:
"This Modpack brings a unique Cobblemon experience where players must challenge gyms to unlock higher Level Caps for their Pokémon. Players can explore a fully-customized world, catch and train various Pokémon, and battle Gym Leaders to strengthen their team. The server emphasizes strategic gameplay, progression, and community interaction, offering both casual and competitive players an engaging Pokémon adventure."

Key Points:

Level Caps are unlocked by defeating gyms.

Fully customized Cobblemon world and trainers.

Includes rare and Legendary Pokémon.

Focus on progression, strategy, and player interaction.
